🚀 Big Launches.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
🚀 Big Launches.summary: SpaceX's IPO has begun with its official share pricing announcement.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‖artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
🚀 Big Launches.summary: The new round values the physical AI startup at $41 billion.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: ToolSense: A Diagnostic Framework for Auditing Parametric Tool Knowledge in LLMs
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: ToolSense is a diagnostic framework for auditing parametric tool knowledge in large language models.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from other streaming platforms to detect AI-generated music.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: The new chatbot allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Amazon’s data centers used 2.5 billion gallons of water last year
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Amazon shared how much water its data centers use, reportedly for the first time.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Anthropic apologized for stealthily throttling its new AI model with hidden guardrails.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Arbor: Tree Search as a Cognition Layer for Autonomous Agents
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Arbor is a multi-agent framework that introduces structured tree search as a cognition layer for autonomous agents.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Strategic Decision Support for AI Agents
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This paper explores strategic decision support for AI agents, where humans and tools become support mechanisms around them.

tool_of_day.title: ToolSense: A Diagnostic Framework for Auditing Parametric Tool Knowledge in LLMs
tool_of_day.summary: ToolSense is a diagnostic framework for auditing parametric tool knowledge in large language models.

hot_take: The intersection of AI, data centers, and water consumption is becoming increasingly important as companies like Amazon and Anthropic face scrutiny over their environmental impact.
